text:
Admission Date:  1987-07-18       Discharge Date:  1970-12-27

Date of Birth:   1988-10-22       Sex:  M

Service:

                     ADDENDUM

DISCHARGE MEDICATIONS:  The patient will be discharged on
additional medications of Coumadin for his chronic atrial
fibrillation.  Goal INR is 06-06.  PT and INR should be checked
at dialysis and dosing adjusted accordingly.  Vancomycin
levels should be drawn at dialysis, and Vancomycin dosed when
random level less then 15.  Dry sterile dressing to the right
toe.  Blood sugars should be checked q.i.d.  Regular Insulin
sliding scale is at all four meals and at bedtime, glucose
less than 150 no Insulin, 151-200 2 U, 201-250 4 U, 251-300 6
U, 301-350 8 U, 351-400 10 U, 401 or greater 12 U regular
Insulin.





                            Mark Espinoza, M.D.  8991

Dictated By:Alexander
MEDQUIST36

D:  1970-12-27  20:24
T:  1970-12-27  21:22
JOB#:  716
